name: 8x8, Inc.
description: 8x8, Inc. is a leading Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) provider of voice, video, chat, contact center, and enterprise-class API solutions powered by one global cloud communications platform. The company empowers workforces worldwide to connect individuals and teams so they can collaborate faster and work smarter. Real-time analytics and intelligence provide businesses with unique insights across all interactions and channels to constantly improve business performance and optimize customer experience.
